title: Command Escape
description: Escape commands in chat with backslash! Send "/command" as regular text by typing "\/command"!
body:
# Command Escape

A simple Fabric mod that allows you to escape commands in chat using a backslash. It can also be used with other things.

## Usage

Simply prefix any command with a backslash to send it as regular text:
- `\/help` → sends "/help" in chat instead of running the command
- `\/tp @p 0 100 0` → sends "/tp @p 0 100 0" as a message
- `\/gamemode creative` → sends "/gamemode creative" as text

Pretty useful if you want to send a command for someone to do and you don't want to do like `./help` or `,/help`, etc.
